description: Perfect for those casual days, these puma Snipper floaters are a great buy. With comfort and style rolled into one, you can never go wrong in a puma Snipper.UpperTwill straps with fabric inner lining to lock the foot in placeVelcro strap closures on the forefoot, front ankle and back heel for a snug, customised FitSuede patches on the sides of strap panels for styleExtra padding on the front ankle and back straps for snug comfortFoam footbed with fabric lining for the ultimate in all-day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with multi-directional lugs for enhanced grip and tractionErgonomically curved for ease of movementshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
